- Top half: white (but with a diagonal split in the bottom-left corner)
- Bottom half: purple (but with a diagonal split in the top-left corner)
Actually, the pattern looks like a diagonal split: top-left white, bottom-right purple. This is the same as before.
The issue is that stamping from the below position doesn't cover the entire bottom half. The block at the below position is a diamond shape that only overlaps with the bottom-right portion of the bottom block.
Let me check the segmentation to see the exact state.
